Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Renal function is mildly impaired (elevated serum creatinine). Urinalysis shows significant proteinuria, glycosuria, ketonuria, and abnormal appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), but no evidence of infection (negative nitrite/leukocytes). Low urine specific gravity suggests impaired concentrating ability. HbA1c is unexpectedly low despite glycosuria; consider possible analytical error or hemoglobinopathy. Findings suggest renal involvement, possibly diabetic nephropathy or acute tubular injury. Recommend clinical correlation and further nephrological evaluation.
